title: adenophora liliifolia var. suaveolens
intro: Adenophora liliifolia var. suaveolens, also known as sweet flower or fragrant lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant in the campanulaceae family, native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting respiratory health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and salves.
